FILE: app/(client)/news/downloads/page.tsx

import Container from "@/components/Container";
import DynamicBreadcrumb from "@/components/DynamicBreadcrumb";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { getNewsDownloads } from "@/sanity/queries";
import dayjs from "dayjs";
import { Calendar, Download, FileDown } from "lucide-react";
import Link from "next/link";

type NewsDownload = {
  _id?: string;
  title?: string;
  slug?: { current?: string };
  publishedAt?: string;
  summary?: string;
  downloadLabel?: string;
  downloadUrl?: string;
  assetUrl?: string;
  blogcategories?: { title?: string }[];
};

const DownloadsPage = async () => {
  const downloads: NewsDownload[] = (await getNewsDownloads()) ?? [];

  const resolveDownloadHref = (item: NewsDownload) =>
    item?.downloadUrl ||
    item?.assetUrl ||
    (item?.slug?.current ? `/news/${item.slug.current}` : "/news");

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-shop_light_bg">
      <Container className="pt-6">
        <DynamicBreadcrumb
          customItems={[
            { label: "News", href: "/news" },
            { label: "Downloads" },
          ]}
        />
      </Container>

      <Container className="py-8 sm:py-12 space-y-8">
        <div className="space-y-3 text-center sm:text-left">
          <Badge className="bg-shop_dark_green text-white hover:bg-shop_light_green">
            Media kits
          </Badge>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green">
            Asset Downloads
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl">
            Logos, product shots, pitch decks, and PDF fact sheets curated for
            press and partners.
          </p>
        </div>

        {downloads?.length ? (
          <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
            {downloads.map((asset) => {
              const href = resolveDownloadHref(asset);
              return (
                <Card key={asset?._id} className="border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
                  <CardHeader>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                      <div>
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-2">
                          {asset?.blogcategories?.[0]?.title || "Press Kit"}
                        </Badge>
                        <CardTitle className="text-xl text-shop_dark_green">
                          {asset?.title}
                        </CardTitle>
                      </div>
                      <FileDown className="h-5 w-5 text-shop_light_green" />
                    </div>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 line-clamp-3">
                      {asset?.summary ||
                        "High-resolution assets and supporting documentation."}
                    </p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                      <Calendar size={14} />
                      Updated {dayjs(asset?.publishedAt).format("MMM D, YYYY")}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                      {asset?.downloadLabel && (
                        <Badge variant="outline">{asset.downloadLabel}</Badge>
                      )}
                      <Button
                        asChild
                        className="bg-shop_dark_green hover:bg-shop_light_green"
                      >
                        <Link
                          href={href}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        >
                          <Download className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /> Download
                        </Link>
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <Card className="p-10 text-center">
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
              <FileDown className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-400" />
              <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                Assets coming soon
              </h3>
              <p className="text-gray-500">
                We&apos;re preparing the latest media kits. Check back shortly.
              </p>
            </div>
          </Card>
        )}
      </Container>
    </div>
  );
};

export default DownloadsPage;


================================================================================
FILE: app/(client)/news/events/[slug]/page.tsx

import CountdownTimer from "@/components/events/CountdownTimer";
import GatedResources, { type EventResourceItem } from "@/components/events/GatedResources";
import RegistrationPanel from "@/components/events/RegistrationPanel";
import RelatedArticles from "@/components/events/RelatedArticles";
import Container from "@/components/Container";
import DynamicBreadcrumb from "@/components/DynamicBreadcrumb";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { computeEventStatus, getRegistrationStatus, type EventStatus } from "@/sanity/helpers";
import { getEventBySlug, getNewsArticles } from "@/sanity/queries";
import { urlFor } from "@/sanity/lib/image";
import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
import dayjs from "dayjs";
import { CalendarDays, Clock, MapPin, Mic, Shield, Users } from "lucide-react";
import Image from "next/image";
import Link from "next/link";
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";

import type { NewsArticleListItem } from "@/components/news/ArticleCard";

export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<EventStatus, string> = {
  upcoming: "Upcoming",
  ongoing: "Happening now",
  ended: "Event ended",
};

const resolveSlug = (value: unknown): string => {
  if (typeof value === "string") return value;
  if (value && typeof value === "object" && typeof (value as { current?: string }).current === "string") {
    return (value as { current?: string }).current as string;
  }
  return "";
};

const formatDateTime = (value?: string | null, fallback: string = "Date TBA") => {
  if (!value) return fallback;
  const parsed = dayjs(value);
  if (!parsed.isValid()) return fallback;
  return parsed.format("dddd, MMMM D, YYYY h:mm A");
};

const normalizeCount = (value?: number | null) =>
  typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : null;

const formatCurrency = (value?: number | null, currency?: string | null) => {
  if (typeof value !== "number" || Number.isNaN(value)) return null;
  const normalizedCurrency = typeof currency === "string" && currency.trim() ? currency.trim() : "THB";
  try {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
      style: "currency",
      currency: normalizedCurrency,
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 2,
    }).format(value);
  } catch {
    return `${normalizedCurrency} ${value.toFixed(2)}`;
  }
};

const EventDetailPage = async ({ params }: { params: Promise<{ slug: string }> }) => {
  const { slug } = await params;
  const normalizedSlug = typeof slug === "string" ? slug : "";
  const { userId } = await auth();
  const event = await getEventBySlug(normalizedSlug, userId ?? null);

  if (!event) return notFound();

  const resolvedSlug =
    resolveSlug(event.slug) || normalizedSlug || (typeof event._id === "string" ? event._id : "");

  const computedStatus =
    event.computedStatus ||
    computeEventStatus({
      date: event.date,
      status: event.status as EventStatus,
      statusOverride: event.statusOverride as EventStatus,
    });

  const now = dayjs();
  const eventMoment = event.date ? dayjs(event.date) : null;
  const hasValidEventDate = Boolean(eventMoment?.isValid());
  const hasPassed = hasValidEventDate ? eventMoment!.isBefore(now, "minute") : false;
  const isSameDay = hasValidEventDate ? eventMoment!.isSame(now, "day") : false;
  const derivedStatus =
    hasValidEventDate && hasPassed ? (isSameDay ? "ongoing" : "ended") : computedStatus;

  const registrationStatus = getRegistrationStatus(event, now.toDate());
  const isAttendee = Boolean(event.isUserAttendee);
  const isUpcoming = derivedStatus === "upcoming";
  const isOngoing = derivedStatus === "ongoing";
  const isEnded = derivedStatus === "ended";
  const capacity = normalizeCount(event.maxAttendees);
  const minTeamSize = normalizeCount(event.minTeamSize);
  const maxTeamSize = normalizeCount(event.maxTeamSize);
  const attendeeCount = normalizeCount(event.attendeeCount);
  const spotsRemaining =
    capacity !== null && attendeeCount !== null ? Math.max(0, capacity - attendeeCount) : null;
  const isFull = capacity !== null && attendeeCount !== null ? attendeeCount >= capacity : false;
  const registrationIsOpen =
    registrationStatus === "open" ||
    registrationStatus === "closing_soon" ||
    registrationStatus === "early_bird";
  const canRegister = !isAttendee && registrationIsOpen && !isFull && !isEnded;
  const canAccessResources = isAttendee && (isOngoing || isEnded);
  const earlyBirdMoment = event.earlyBirdDeadline ? dayjs(event.earlyBirdDeadline) : null;
  const isEarlyBird = Boolean(earlyBirdMoment?.isValid() && earlyBirdMoment.isAfter(now));
  const heroImage = event.image
    ? urlFor(event.image).width(1400).height(720).fit("crop").url()
    : null;
  const formattedDate = formatDateTime(event.date);
  const attendeeProfile =
    Array.isArray(event.attendees) && event.attendees.length ? event.attendees[0] : null;
  const eventResources: EventResourceItem[] = Array.isArray(event.resources)
    ? (event.resources as unknown as EventResourceItem[])
    : [];
  const agendaItems = Array.isArray(event.agenda) ? event.agenda : [];
  const speakers = Array.isArray(event.speakers) ? event.speakers : [];
  const registrationFeeLabel = formatCurrency(event.registrationFee, event.currency);
  const registrationDeadlineLabel = event.registrationDeadline
    ? formatDateTime(event.registrationDeadline, "Registration deadline not set")
    : null;
  const earlyBirdLabel =
    isEarlyBird && earlyBirdMoment?.isValid()
      ? formatDateTime(event.earlyBirdDeadline, "Early bird deadline")
      : null;
  const earlyBirdBadgeLabel =
    isEarlyBird && earlyBirdMoment?.isValid()
      ? earlyBirdMoment.format("MMM D, YYYY h:mm A")
      : null;
  const isB2B = Array.isArray(event.targetAudience) && event.targetAudience.length > 0;

  const relatedArticles = event._id
    ? await getNewsArticles({
        linkedEvent: event._id,
        limit: 3,
        offset: 0,
        sort: "newest",
      })
    : null;

  const relatedItems: NewsArticleListItem[] = Array.isArray(relatedArticles?.items)
    ? (relatedArticles.items as NewsArticleListItem[])
    : [];

  const breadcrumbItems = [
    { label: "News", href: "/news" },
    { label: "Events", href: "/news/events" },
    { label: event.title || "Event" },
  ];

  const registrationStatusLabel = (() => {
    if (isEnded || registrationStatus === "ended") return "Event ended";
    if (isFull || registrationStatus === "waitlist") return "Waitlist only";
    if (registrationStatus === "closing_soon") return "Registration closing soon";
    if (registrationStatus === "early_bird") return "Early bird open";
    if (registrationStatus === "closed" || event.registrationOpen === false) return "Registration closed";
    if (isOngoing) return "Live now";
    if (registrationIsOpen) return "Registration open";
    return "Registration closed";
  })();

  const timeUntil =
    isUpcoming && eventMoment
      ? eventMoment.diff(now, "minute") > 0
        ? eventMoment.diff(now, "hour") >= 24
          ? `${eventMoment.diff(now, "day")} days to go`
          : `${Math.max(1, eventMoment.diff(now, "hour"))} hours to go`
        : null
      : null;
  const visibleAgenda = agendaItems.slice(0, 5);
  const remainingAgenda = agendaItems.slice(5);
  const renderAgendaItem = (
    item: { _key?: string; time?: string; title?: string; description?: string; speaker?: string },
    index: number,
    listLength: number
  ) => (
    <div key={item._key ?? `${item.title ?? "agenda"}-${index}`} className="flex gap-3">
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
        <span className="rounded-full bg-shop_light_bg px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-shop_dark_green">
          {item.time || `Slot ${index + 1}`}
        </span>
        {index < listLength - 1 ? <span className="mt-2 h-full w-px bg-gray-200" aria-hidden="true" /> : null}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <p className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{item.title || "Agenda item"}</p>
          {item.speaker ? <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-shop_light_green">{item.speaker}</span> : null}
        </div>
        {item.description ? <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600">{item.description}</p> : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="bg-gradient-to-b from-shop_light_bg/60 to-white">
      <Container className="pt-6">
        <DynamicBreadcrumb customItems={breadcrumbItems} />
      </Container>

      <section className="relative overflow-hidden">
        {heroImage ? (
          <div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10">
            <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 via-black/40 to-black/20" />
            <Image
              src={heroImage}
              alt={event.title || "Event"}
              fill
              priority
              className="object-cover"
              sizes="100vw"
            />
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10 bg-gradient-to-b from-shop_dark_green/20 to-shop_light_bg" />
        )}

        <Container className="relative py-10">
          <div className="grid items-center gap-8 lg:grid-cols-[1.7fr,1fr]">
            <div className="space-y-4 rounded-3xl bg-white/85 p-6 shadow-lg backdrop-blur">
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <Badge className="bg-shop_dark_green text-white">{STATUS_LABELS[derivedStatus]}</Badge>
                <Badge variant="outline" className="border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-800">
                  {registrationStatusLabel}
                </Badge>
                {earlyBirdBadgeLabel ? (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-900">
                    Early Bird until {earlyBirdBadgeLabel}
                  </Badge>
                ) : null}
                {timeUntil ? (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="border-white bg-white text-shop_dark_green">
                    {timeUntil}
                  </Badge>
                ) : null}
              </div>
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green sm:text-4xl">
                {event.title || "Event"}
              </h1>
              <p className="text-lg text-gray-800">
                {event.description ||
                  "Join us for a focused session covering product updates, customer stories, and hands-on demos."}
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-700">
                <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CalendarDays className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                  <time dateTime={event.date ?? undefined}>{formattedDate}</time>
                </span>
                {event.location ? (
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2">
                    <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                    {event.location}
                  </span>
                ) : null}
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                {canRegister ? (
                  <Button
                    asChild
                    className="bg-shop_dark_green text-white hover:bg-shop_light_green"
                  >
                    <a href="#registration">Reserve my seat</a>
                  </Button>
                ) : (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-white text-gray-700">
                    {registrationStatusLabel}
                  </Badge>
                )}
                <Button variant="outline" asChild className="border-gray-200">
                  <Link href="/news/events">Back to events</Link>
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <Card className="border border-white/70 bg-white/90 shadow-xl">
              <CardHeader className="space-y-2">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  <Shield className="h-4 w-4 text-shop_light_green" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Event status
                </div>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center justify-between text-2xl text-shop_dark_green">
                  {STATUS_LABELS[derivedStatus]}
                  {spotsRemaining !== null ? (
                    <Badge className="bg-emerald-600 text-white">
                      {spotsRemaining} spot{spotsRemaining === 1 ? "" : "s"} left
                    </Badge>
                  ) : null}
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-3 text-sm text-gray-700">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl bg-shop_light_bg/60 px-3 py-2">
                  <span className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">Registration</span>
                  <Badge
                    variant="outline"
                    className={
                      registrationStatus === "closing_soon"
                        ? "border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-900"
                        : registrationStatus === "early_bird"
                        ? "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-900"
                        : registrationIsOpen
                        ? "border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-900"
                        : "border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"
                    }
                  >
                    {registrationStatusLabel}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
                {registrationDeadlineLabel ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-gray-100 px-3 py-2">
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-700">
                      <Clock className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                      Registration deadline
                    </span>
                    <span
                      className={`font-semibold ${
                        registrationStatus === "closing_soon" ? "text-amber-700" : "text-shop_dark_green"
                      }`}
                    >
                      {registrationDeadlineLabel}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
                {earlyBirdLabel ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-emerald-50 px-3 py-2">
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-emerald-800">
                      <CalendarDays className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                      Early Bird until
                    </span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-900">{earlyBirdLabel}</span>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
                {registrationFeeLabel ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-gray-100 px-3 py-2">
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-700">
                      <Shield className="h-4 w-4 text-shop_light_green" aria-hidden="true" />
                      Registration fee
                    </span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{registrationFeeLabel}</span>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
                {capacity !== null ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-gray-100 px-3 py-2">
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-700">
                      <Users className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                      Capacity
                    </span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                      {attendeeCount ?? 0}/{capacity} booked
                      {spotsRemaining !== null ? ` \u2022 ${spotsRemaining} left` : ""}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
                {timeUntil ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-gray-100 px-3 py-2">
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-700">
                      <Clock className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                      Event countdown
                    </span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{timeUntil}</span>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>
        </Container>
      </section>

      <Container className="pb-14">
        <div className="grid gap-8 lg:grid-cols-[1.7fr,1fr]">
          <div className="space-y-6">
            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xl text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Shield className="h-5 w-5" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Event overview
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4 text-gray-700">
                <p className="text-base leading-relaxed">
                  {event.description ||
                    "We\u2019ll cover highlights from the latest release, preview what\u2019s next on the roadmap, and leave time for Q&A."}
                </p>
                <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
                  <div className="rounded-xl bg-shop_light_bg/80 p-4 shadow-sm">
                    <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-gray-500">Schedule</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{formattedDate}</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Add to calendar after you register.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-xl bg-shop_light_bg/80 p-4 shadow-sm">
                    <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-gray-500">Location</p>
                    <p className="mt-1 font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                      {event.location || "Location will be announced"}
                    </p>
                    {event.location ? (
                      <Link
                        href={`https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=${encodeURIComponent(event.location)}`}
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        className="text-sm font-semibold text-shop_light_green hover:text-shop_dark_green"
                      >
                        Open in Maps
                      </Link>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xl text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Clock className="h-5 w-5" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Agenda
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4 text-gray-700">
                {agendaItems.length ? (
                  <>
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                      {visibleAgenda.map((item, index) =>
                        renderAgendaItem(item, index, visibleAgenda.length)
                      )}
                    </div>
                    {remainingAgenda.length ? (
                      <details className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-shop_light_bg/70 p-4 text-sm text-gray-700">
                        <summary className="flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-between font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                          View full agenda
                          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {remainingAgenda.length} more item{remainingAgenda.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}
                          </span>
                        </summary>
                        <div className="mt-3 space-y-4">
                          {remainingAgenda.map((item, index) =>
                            renderAgendaItem(item, index, remainingAgenda.length)
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </details>
                    ) : null}
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                      Timing may adjust slightly; we\u2019ll email you if anything shifts.
                    </p>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Agenda coming soon. We&apos;ll share the detailed timeline once it&apos;s finalized.
                  </p>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            {speakers.length ? (
              <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
                <CardHeader>
                  <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xl text-shop_dark_green">
                    <Mic className="h-5 w-5" aria-hidden="true" />
                    Speakers
                  </CardTitle>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
                    {speakers.map((speaker, index) => {
                      const speakerImage =
                        speaker?.image && urlFor(speaker.image).width(240).height(240).fit("crop").url();
                      const subtitle = [speaker?.title, speaker?.company].filter(Boolean).join(" \u2022 ");
                      const initial = typeof speaker?.name === "string" ? speaker.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() : "S";

                      return (
                        <details
                          key={speaker?._key ?? `${speaker?.name ?? "speaker"}-${index}`}
                          className="group rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-shop_light_bg/60 p-4 shadow-sm transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md"
                        >
                          <summary className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-3">
                            <div className="relative h-14 w-14 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-shop_light_bg">
                              {speakerImage ? (
                                <Image
                                  src={speakerImage}
                                  alt={speaker?.name || "Speaker"}
                                  fill
                                  className="object-cover"
                                  sizes="96px"
                                />
                              ) : (
                                <span className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center text-lg font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                                  {initial}
                                </span>
                              )}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1">
                              <p className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{speaker?.name || "Speaker"}</p>
                              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{subtitle || "Guest presenter"}</p>
                              <p className="text-xs text-shop_light_green group-open:hidden">Tap to read bio</p>
                            </div>
                          </summary>
                          {speaker?.bio ? (
                            <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-relaxed text-gray-700 group-open:animate-fadeIn">
                              {speaker.bio}
                            </p>
                          ) : null}
                        </details>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            ) : null}

            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xl text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Shield className="h-5 w-5" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Event resources
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <GatedResources
                  resources={eventResources}
                  isAttendee={isAttendee}
                  canAccess={canAccessResources}
                  status={derivedStatus}
                />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <RelatedArticles articles={relatedItems} />
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-6" id="registration">
            {event.registrationDeadline ? (
              <CountdownTimer
                targetDate={event.registrationDeadline}
                className="border border-gray-100"
                label={registrationStatus === "closing_soon" ? "Registration closing soon" : "Registration closes in"}
              />
            ) : null}
            {isB2B && event.teamRegistrationEnabled !== false ? (
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-shop_light_green bg-shop_light_bg/80 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-shop_dark_green">
                <p className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">Team registration is encouraged</p>
                <p className="text-gray-700">
                  Perfect for dealer and distributor teams.{" "}
                  {minTeamSize || maxTeamSize ? (
                    <span>
                      {minTeamSize ? `Teams of ${minTeamSize}+` : "Teams"}{" "}
                      {maxTeamSize ? `up to ${maxTeamSize} people` : "are welcome"}.
                    </span>
                  ) : (
                    "Bring your crew to learn together."
                  )}
                </p>
              </div>
            ) : null}
            <RegistrationPanel
              eventId={event._id || ""}
              eventSlug={resolvedSlug}
              eventTitle={event.title}
              eventDate={event.date}
              eventLocation={event.location}
              eventDescription={event.description}
              attendeeProfile={attendeeProfile}
              registrationStatusLabel={registrationStatusLabel}
              canRegister={canRegister}
              isAttendee={isAttendee}
              isEnded={isEnded}
              isFull={isFull}
              maxAttendees={event.maxAttendees}
              attendeeCount={attendeeCount ?? undefined}
              registrationDeadline={event.registrationDeadline}
              earlyBirdDeadline={event.earlyBirdDeadline}
              teamRegistrationEnabled={event.teamRegistrationEnabled}
              minTeamSize={minTeamSize}
              maxTeamSize={maxTeamSize}
              registrationFee={event.registrationFee}
              currency={event.currency}
            />

            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg text-shop_dark_green">
                  <MapPin className="h-5 w-5" aria-hidden="true" />
                  Directions & logistics
                </CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-3 text-sm text-gray-700">
                <p>
                  {event.location
                    ? "Plan to arrive 10 minutes early. Use the map link for directions."
                    : "Location details will be shared with confirmed attendees."}
                </p>
                {event.location ? (
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                    <span className="font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{event.location}</span>
                    <Button
                      asChild
                      variant="outline"
                      className="border-gray-200 text-shop_dark_green hover:bg-shop_light_bg"
                    >
                      <Link
                        href={`https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=${encodeURIComponent(event.location)}`}
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                      >
                        Open in Maps
                      </Link>
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Container>
    </div>
  );
};

export default EventDetailPage;


================================================================================
FILE: app/(client)/news/events/page.tsx

import Container from "@/components/Container";
import DynamicBreadcrumb from "@/components/DynamicBreadcrumb";
import EventGrid, { type EventListItem } from "@/components/events/EventGrid";
import NewsletterForm from "@/components/NewsletterForm";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { computeEventStatus, type EventStatus } from "@/sanity/helpers/eventStatus";
import { getEvents } from "@/sanity/queries";
import { ArrowRight, CalendarDays, Mail, Search, Sparkles } from "lucide-react";
import Link from "next/link";
import type { Metadata } from "next";

type EventsSearchParams = {
  status?: string | string[];
  type?: string | string[];
  search?: string | string[];
  page?: string | string[];
};

type EventsPageProps = {
  searchParams?: EventsSearchParams | Promise<EventsSearchParams>;
};

type StatusTab = "all" | "upcoming" | "past";

type EventListItemWithType = EventListItem & { eventType?: string | null };

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Events & Seminars | Newsroom",
  description:
    "Browse upcoming seminars, workshops, and community events. Filter by status or topic and reserve your seat.",
};

const EVENTS_PER_PAGE = 12;

const STATUS_TABS: { value: StatusTab; label: string }[] = [
  { value: "all", label: "All" },
  { value: "upcoming", label: "Upcoming" },
  { value: "past", label: "Past" },
];

const parseParam = (value?: string | string[]) => (Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] ?? "" : value || "");
const parseStatusTab = (value: string): StatusTab => {
  const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === "upcoming") return "upcoming";
  if (normalized === "past" || normalized === "ended") return "past";
  return "all";
};
const parsePage = (value: string) => {
  const pageNumber = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
  return Number.isFinite(pageNumber) && pageNumber > 0 ? pageNumber : 1;
};
const normalizeEventType = (value: string) => value.trim().toLowerCase();
const formatEventTypeLabel = (value: string) =>
  value
    ? value
        .replace(/[_-]/g, " ")
        .split(" ")
        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
        .join(" ")
    : "All types";
const deriveStatus = (event: EventListItem) =>
  event.computedStatus ||
  computeEventStatus({
    date: event.date,
    status: event.status as EventStatus,
    statusOverride: event.statusOverride as EventStatus,
  });

const EventsPage = async ({ searchParams }: EventsPageProps) => {
  const resolvedSearchParams = await searchParams;

  const statusTab = parseStatusTab(parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.status));
  const statusFilter: EventStatus | undefined =
    statusTab === "upcoming" ? "upcoming" : statusTab === "past" ? "ended" : undefined;
  const searchValue = parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.search).trim();
  const searchQuery = searchValue.toLowerCase();
  const requestedType = normalizeEventType(parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.type));
  const currentPage = parsePage(parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.page));

  const events = ((await getEvents(statusFilter, "asc")) ?? []) as EventListItemWithType[];

  const eventTypeValues = Array.from(
    new Set(
      events
        .map((event) => normalizeEventType(event.eventType || ""))
        .filter(Boolean)
    )
  );
  const eventTypeOptions = eventTypeValues.map((value) => ({
    value,
    label: formatEventTypeLabel(value),
  }));
  const hasEventTypeFilter = eventTypeOptions.length > 1;
  const selectedType =
    hasEventTypeFilter && requestedType && eventTypeValues.includes(requestedType) ? requestedType : "";

  const filteredEvents = events.filter((event) => {
    if (selectedType) {
      const eventType = normalizeEventType(event.eventType || "");
      if (eventType !== selectedType) return false;
    }

    if (searchQuery) {
      const title = (event.title || "").toLowerCase();
      if (!title.includes(searchQuery)) return false;
    }

    return true;
  });

  const visibleEvents = filteredEvents.slice(0, currentPage * EVENTS_PER_PAGE);
  const canLoadMore = filteredEvents.length > visibleEvents.length;

  const hasClientFilters = statusTab !== "all" || Boolean(searchQuery) || Boolean(selectedType);
  const emptyMessage =
    events.length === 0 && !hasClientFilters
      ? "No events scheduled. Check back soon!"
      : "No events match your filters";

  const createHref = (overrides: Partial<{ statusTab: StatusTab; type: string; search: string; page: number }>) => {
    const query = new URLSearchParams();

    const nextStatus = overrides.statusTab ?? statusTab;
    if (nextStatus !== "all") {
      query.set("status", nextStatus);
    }

    const nextType = hasEventTypeFilter ? overrides.type ?? selectedType : "";
    if (nextType) {
      query.set("type", nextType);
    }

    const nextSearch = overrides.search ?? searchValue;
    if (nextSearch) {
      query.set("search", nextSearch);
    }

    const nextPage = overrides.page ?? currentPage;
    if (nextPage > 1) {
      query.set("page", String(nextPage));
    }

    const qs = query.toString();
    return qs ? `/news/events?${qs}` : "/news/events";
  };

  const statusCounts = events.reduce(
    (acc, event) => {
      const status = deriveStatus(event);
      if (status === "upcoming" || status === "ongoing") {
        acc.upcoming += 1;
      }
      if (status === "ended") {
        acc.past += 1;
      }
      return acc;
    },
    { upcoming: 0, past: 0 }
  );

  const filterGridClass = hasEventTypeFilter
    ? "grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-[2fr,1.2fr,auto]"
    : "grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-[2fr,auto]";

  return (
    <div className="bg-gradient-to-b from-shop_light_bg/60 to-white">
      <Container className="py-8 space-y-8 sm:space-y-10">
        <DynamicBreadcrumb
          customItems={[
            { label: "News", href: "/news" },
            { label: "Events" },
          ]}
        />

        <section className="rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 bg-white/70 p-6 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm sm:p-8">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-shop_dark_green">
                Newsroom spotlight
              </p>
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green sm:text-4xl">
                Events & Seminars
              </h1>
              <p className="text-gray-700 text-lg max-w-3xl">
                Join upcoming launches, skill-building workshops, and community seminars led by the team and partners.
                Filter by status or topic and reserve your seat in a few clicks.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="flex w-full flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 bg-shop_light_bg px-5 py-4 text-sm text-gray-700 shadow-inner sm:w-auto sm:max-w-xs">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <CalendarDays className="h-5 w-5 text-shop_dark_green" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-shop_dark_green">Upcoming</p>
                  <p className="text-base font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{statusCounts.upcoming} events</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-600" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-shop_dark_green">Past highlights</p>
                  <p className="text-base font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">{statusCounts.past} archived</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-[minmax(0,2fr),minmax(260px,1fr)]">
          <div className="space-y-6">
            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
              <CardHeader className="space-y-1">
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5" />
                  Tailor the lineup
                </CardTitle>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Switch status tabs, narrow by event type, or search by title to find the right session.
                </p>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {STATUS_TABS.map((tab) => {
                    const isActive = tab.value === statusTab;
                    return (
                      <Button
                        asChild
                        key={tab.value}
                        variant={isActive ? "default" : "outline"}
                        className={
                          isActive
                            ? "bg-shop_dark_green text-white hover:bg-shop_light_green"
                            : "border-gray-200 bg-white text-shop_dark_green hover:border-shop_light_green"
                        }
                      >
                        <Link href={createHref({ statusTab: tab.value, page: 1 })}>{tab.label}</Link>
                      </Button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>

                <form className={filterGridClass} method="GET">
                  {statusTab !== "all" ? (
                    <input type="hidden" name="status" value={statusTab} />
                  ) : null}

                  <div>
                    <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-semibold text-shop_dark_green" htmlFor="search">
                      Search by title
                    </label>
                    <div className="relative">
                      <Search className="pointer-events-none absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
                      <Input
                        id="search"
                        name="search"
                        placeholder="E.g. quarterly briefing, dealer workshop"
                        defaultValue={searchValue}
                        className="pl-9"
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {hasEventTypeFilter ? (
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      <label className="text-sm font-semibold text-shop_dark_green" htmlFor="type">
                        Event type
                      </label>
                      <select
                        id="type"
                        name="type"
                        defaultValue={selectedType}
                        className="h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-xs focus-visible:outline-hidden focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring"
                      >
                        <option value="">All types</option>
                        {eventTypeOptions.map((option) => (
                          <option key={option.value} value={option.value}>
                            {option.label}
                          </option>
                        ))}
                      </select>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  <div className="flex items-end justify-end gap-2">
                    <Button
                      type="submit"
                      className="bg-shop_dark_green text-white hover:bg-shop_light_green"
                    >
                      Apply
                    </Button>
                    <Button variant="outline" asChild>
                      <Link href="/news/events">Reset</Link>
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </form>

                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  <span>
                    Showing{" "}
                    <strong className="text-shop_dark_green">{visibleEvents.length}</strong> of{" "}
                    <strong className="text-shop_dark_green">{filteredEvents.length}</strong>{" "}
                    event{filteredEvents.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}{" "}
                    {statusTab === "all" ? "" : `under ${statusTab === "past" ? "past" : "upcoming"} status`}
                    {selectedType ? ` \u00b7 ${formatEventTypeLabel(selectedType)}` : ""}
                    {searchValue ? ` \u00b7 matching \u201c${searchValue}\u201d` : ""}.
                  </span>
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-shop_light_bg px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-shop_dark_green">
                    <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4" />
                    Status filters run server-side
                  </span>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card id="events-list" className="border border-gray-100 shadow-md">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-shop_dark_green">Upcoming & archived sessions</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                <EventGrid events={visibleEvents} emptyMessage={emptyMessage} />

                {canLoadMore ? (
                  <div className="flex justify-center">
                    <Button
                      asChild
                      variant="outline"
                      className="border-shop_dark_green/30 text-shop_dark_green hover:bg-shop_light_bg"
                    >
                      <Link href={createHref({ page: currentPage + 1 })}>
                        Load more
                        <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4" />
                      </Link>
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <aside className="space-y-4">
            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-shop_dark_green">Your Registrations</CardTitle>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Jump to your RSVPs, manage team slots, or update attendee details.
                </p>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <Button
                  asChild
                  className="w-full bg-shop_dark_green text-white hover:bg-shop_light_green"
                >
                  <Link href="/dashboard/registrations">
                    Go to registrations
                    <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </Link>
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-shop_dark_green">Stay in the loop</CardTitle>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Subscribe for invitations, recaps, and new seminar drops.
                </p>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-3">
                <NewsletterForm />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-shop_dark_green">Host an Event</CardTitle>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Want to run a training or spotlight your work? Share the details and we&apos;ll help set it up.
                </p>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-3">
                <Button variant="outline" asChild className="w-full border-shop_dark_green/30 text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Link href="/contact">
                    Contact the team
                    <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </Link>
                </Button>
                <Button variant="ghost" asChild className="w-full justify-start text-shop_dark_green">
                  <Link href="mailto:events@shopcart.com">
                    <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                    events@shopcart.com
                  </Link>
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </aside>
        </div>
      </Container>
    </div>
  );
};

export default EventsPage;

================================================================================
FILE: app/(client)/news/page.tsx

import Container from "@/components/Container";
import DynamicBreadcrumb from "@/components/DynamicBreadcrumb";
import ArticleGrid from "@/components/news/ArticleGrid";
import NewsFilters from "@/components/news/NewsFilters";
import type { NewsArticleListItem } from "@/components/news/ArticleCard";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import {
  Pagination,
  PaginationContent,
  PaginationEllipsis,
  PaginationItem,
  PaginationLink,
  PaginationNext,
  PaginationPrevious,
} from "@/components/ui/pagination";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import {
  generateItemListSchema,
  generateNewsArticleSchema,
} from "@/lib/seo";
import { getNewsArticles } from "@/sanity/queries";
import { Megaphone, Sparkles, TimerReset } from "lucide-react";
import Link from "next/link";
import type { Metadata } from "next";

const NEWS_PAGE_SIZE = 9;

const CATEGORY_OPTIONS = [
  { label: "All", value: "all" },
  { label: "Announcements", value: "announcement" },
  { label: "Partnerships", value: "partnership" },
  { label: "Event updates", value: "event_announcement" },
  { label: "General", value: "general" },
];

type NewsSearchParams = {
  category?: string | string[];
  type?: string | string[];
  search?: string | string[];
  sort?: string | string[];
  page?: string | string[];
};

type NewsPageProps = {
  searchParams?: NewsSearchParams | Promise<NewsSearchParams>;
};

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Newsroom | Product updates, events, and resources",
  description:
    "Stay current with announcements, launch notes, and resource-ready articles from the ShopCart team.",
};

const parseParam = (value?: string | string[]) =>
  Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value || "";

const calculateAverageReadTime = (articles: NewsArticleListItem[]) => {
  if (!articles.length) return 2;

  const total = articles.reduce((sum, article) => {
    const text = article.plainText || article.excerpt || "";
    const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
    return sum + Math.max(1, Math.ceil(words / 200));
  }, 0);

  return Math.max(1, Math.round(total / articles.length));
};

const buildStructuredData = (articles: NewsArticleListItem[]) => {
  const articleSchemas = articles
    .map((article) => generateNewsArticleSchema(article as any))
    .filter(Boolean);

  const itemListSchema = generateItemListSchema(articles as any, "News Hub", {
    basePath: "/news",
  });

  return [...articleSchemas, itemListSchema].filter(Boolean) as Record<string, unknown>[];
};

const buildPageHref = (page: number, params: { category?: string; search?: string; sort?: string }) => {
  const query = new URLSearchParams();

  if (params.category) query.set("category", params.category);
  if (params.search) query.set("search", params.search);
  if (params.sort) query.set("sort", params.sort);
  query.set("page", page.toString());

  const qs = query.toString();
  return qs ? `/news?${qs}` : "/news";
};

const buildPageList = (totalPages: number, currentPage: number) => {
  if (totalPages <= 1) return [1];

  const pages: Array<number | "ellipsis"> = [];

  const addPage = (page: number) => {
    if (!pages.includes(page)) {
      pages.push(page);
    }
  };

  addPage(1);

  const start = Math.max(2, currentPage - 1);
  const end = Math.min(totalPages - 1, currentPage + 1);

  if (start > 2) {
    pages.push("ellipsis");
  }

  for (let page = start; page <= end; page += 1) {
    addPage(page);
  }

  if (end < totalPages - 1) {
    pages.push("ellipsis");
  }

  if (totalPages > 1) {
    addPage(totalPages);
  }

  return pages;
};

const NewsPage = async ({ searchParams }: NewsPageProps) => {
  const resolvedSearchParams = await searchParams;
  const rawCategoryParam =
    parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.category) || parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.type);
  const categoryParam =
    rawCategoryParam && rawCategoryParam !== "all" ? rawCategoryParam : "";
  const searchQuery = parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.search);
  const sortParam = parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.sort) || "newest";
  const pageParam = parseParam(resolvedSearchParams?.page);
  const parsedPage = Number.parseInt(pageParam, 10);
  const page = Number.isFinite(parsedPage) && parsedPage > 0 ? parsedPage : 1;
  const offset = (page - 1) * NEWS_PAGE_SIZE;

  const newsData = await getNewsArticles(
    categoryParam || undefined,
    searchQuery || undefined,
    NEWS_PAGE_SIZE,
    offset,
    sortParam
  );

  const articles: NewsArticleListItem[] = Array.isArray(newsData?.items)
    ? (newsData.items as NewsArticleListItem[])
    : [];

  const totalCount = newsData?.totalCount ?? articles.length ?? 0;
  const totalPages =
    newsData?.totalPages ?? (totalCount > 0 ? Math.ceil(totalCount / NEWS_PAGE_SIZE) : 0);
  const currentPage = Math.min(
    Math.max(newsData?.currentPage ?? page, 1),
    Math.max(totalPages, 1)
  );
  const normalizedSort = newsData?.sort || sortParam || "newest";
  const sortForUrl = normalizedSort.replace(/_/g, "-");
  const structuredData = buildStructuredData(articles);
  const averageReadTime = calculateAverageReadTime(articles);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-shop_light_bg to-white">
      {structuredData.map((schema, index) => (
        <script
          key={index}
          type="application/ld+json"
          // eslint-disable-next-line react/no-danger
          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: JSON.stringify(schema) }}
        />
      ))}

      <Container className="pt-6">
        <DynamicBreadcrumb customItems={[{ label: "News", href: "/news" }]} />
      </Container>

      <Container className="py-8 sm:py-12">
        <Card className="overflow-hidden border-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-shop_dark_green to-shop_light_green text-white shadow-xl">
          <CardContent className="p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-12">
            <div className="grid gap-8 lg:grid-cols-[1.5fr,1fr] lg:items-center">
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-white/10 px-4 py-1 text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide">
                  <Megaphone className="h-4 w-4" /> Newsroom
                </div>
                <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold leading-tight sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl">
                  Product news, events, and resource-ready releases
                </h1>
                <p className="max-w-3xl text-sm text-white/90 sm:text-base">
                  Track launches, announcements, and media moments. Every story ships with the
                  attachments and context partners need to stay informed.
                </p>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                  <Button
                    asChild
                    className="bg-white text-shop_dark_green hover:bg-white/90"
                  >
                    <Link href="/news/resources">Browse attachments & resources</Link>
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    variant="outline"
                    asChild
                    className="border-white text-white hover:bg-white/10"
                  >
                    <Link href="/news/events">View events</Link>
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/10 p-4 sm:grid-cols-3">
                <div className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 p-4">
                  <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/80">
                    Published stories
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-3xl font-bold">
                    {totalCount.toString().padStart(2, "0")}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 p-4">
                  <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/80">
                    Avg. read time
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-3xl font-bold">{averageReadTime} mins</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-xl bg-white/10 p-4">
                  <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/80">
                    Categories
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-3xl font-bold">
                    {(CATEGORY_OPTIONS.length - 1).toString().padStart(2, "0")}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </Container>

      <Container className="py-6 sm:py-8">
        <NewsFilters
          categories={CATEGORY_OPTIONS}
          activeCategory={rawCategoryParam || "all"}
          activeSort={sortForUrl}
          searchQuery={searchQuery}
          totalCount={totalCount}
        />
      </Container>

      <Container className="py-6 sm:py-10">
        <div className="mb-6 space-y-2">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-shop_light_bg px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-shop_dark_green">
            <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4" />
            Fresh from the newsroom
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green sm:text-3xl">
            Latest articles & attachments
          </h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 sm:text-base">
            Filter by category, search across releases, and sort to find the right update fast.
          </p>
        </div>

        <ArticleGrid articles={articles} highlightFirst />

        {totalPages > 1 ? (
          <div className="mt-10 space-y-3">
            <Separator />
            <Pagination>
              <PaginationContent>
                <PaginationItem>
                  <PaginationPrevious
                    href={buildPageHref(
                      Math.max(currentPage - 1, 1),
                      { category: categoryParam, search: searchQuery, sort: sortForUrl }
                    )}
                    className={
                      currentPage <= 1 ? "pointer-events-none opacity-50" : undefined
                    }
                  />
                </PaginationItem>

                {buildPageList(totalPages, currentPage).map((pageNumber, index) => {
                  if (pageNumber === "ellipsis") {
                    return (
                      <PaginationItem key={`ellipsis-${index}`}>
                        <PaginationEllipsis />
                      </PaginationItem>
                    );
                  }

                  return (
                    <PaginationItem key={pageNumber}>
                      <PaginationLink
                        href={buildPageHref(pageNumber, {
                          category: categoryParam,
                          search: searchQuery,
                          sort: sortForUrl,
                        })}
                        isActive={pageNumber === currentPage}
                      >
                        {pageNumber}
                      </PaginationLink>
                    </PaginationItem>
                  );
                })}

                <PaginationItem>
                  <PaginationNext
                    href={buildPageHref(
                      Math.min(currentPage + 1, totalPages),
                      { category: categoryParam, search: searchQuery, sort: sortForUrl }
                    )}
                    className={
                      currentPage >= totalPages ? "pointer-events-none opacity-50" : undefined
                    }
                  />
                </PaginationItem>
              </PaginationContent>
            </Pagination>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </Container>

      <Container className="pb-12 pt-4 sm:pt-2">
        <Card className="border-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-shop_light_pink to-light-orange/20">
          <CardContent className="p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-12 text-center">
            <div className="mx-auto max-w-2xl">
              <TimerReset className="mx-auto mb-4 h-12 w-12 text-shop_dark_green" />
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl">
                Stay in the loop
              </h2>
              <p className="mb-6 text-sm text-gray-600 sm:text-base">
                Subscribe for launch notes, media kits, and new attachment drops as soon as they
                land.
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 sm:flex-row">
                <Button className="bg-shop_dark_green hover:bg-shop_light_green" size="lg">
                  Get news alerts
                </Button>
                <Button
                  size="lg"
                  variant="outline"
                  className="border-shop_dark_green text-shop_dark_green hover:bg-shop_dark_green hover:text-white"
                  asChild
                >
                  <Link href="/news/resources">Open resources</Link>
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </Container>
    </div>
  );
};

export default NewsPage;

FILE: app/(client)/news/resources/page.tsx

import ResourcesClient from "@/components/resources/ResourcesClient";
import Container from "@/components/Container";
import DynamicBreadcrumb from "@/components/DynamicBreadcrumb";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import type { AggregatedResource } from "@/sanity/queries/resources";
import { getAllResources } from "@/sanity/queries";
import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";

const ResourcesPage = async () => {
  const { userId } = await auth();
  const fetchedResources = await getAllResources({ userId: userId ?? null });
  const resources: AggregatedResource[] = Array.isArray(fetchedResources) ? fetchedResources : [];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
      <Container className="pt-6">
        <DynamicBreadcrumb
          customItems={[
            { label: "News", href: "/news" },
            { label: "Resources" },
          ]}
        />
      </Container>

      <Container className="py-8 sm:py-12 space-y-8">
        <div className="space-y-3 text-center sm:text-left">
          <Badge className="bg-amber-500 text-white">Resources</Badge>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-shop_dark_green">Knowledge base & enablement docs</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl">
            All downloadable assets from news articles and events in one place. Filter by source, file type, or event
            status, and switch between grid or list views.
          </p>
        </div>

        <ResourcesClient resources={resources} />
      </Container>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ResourcesPage;

import HomeCategories from "@/components/HomeCategories";
import NewsHighlight from "@/components/NewsHighlight";
import HomeBanner from "@/components/HomeBanner";
import ProductGrid from "@/components/ProductGrid";
import ShopByBrands from "@/components/ShopByBrands";
import ShopFeatures from "@/components/ShopFeatures";
import { PromotionsShowcase } from "@/components/homepage/PromotionsShowcase";
import { getActivePromotions, getHomepageDeals, getRootCategoriesForNav } from "@/sanity/queries";
import { generateOrganizationSchema, generateWebsiteSchema } from "@/lib/seo";

export default async function Home() {
  const [categories, promotions, deals] = await Promise.all([
    getRootCategoriesForNav(),
    getActivePromotions(),
    getHomepageDeals(),
  ]);

  // Generate structured data
  const organizationSchema = generateOrganizationSchema();
  const websiteSchema = generateWebsiteSchema();

  return (
    <main>
      {/* JSON-LD Structured Data */}
      <script
        type="application/ld+json"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
          __html: JSON.stringify(organizationSchema),
        }}
      />
      <script
        type="application/ld+json"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
          __html: JSON.stringify(websiteSchema),
        }}
      />

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <HomeBanner />

      {/* Promotions Showcase - high visibility placement */}
      <PromotionsShowcase promotions={promotions} deals={deals} />

      <section className="py-10">
        <ProductGrid />
        <HomeCategories categories={categories} />
        <ShopFeatures />
        <ShopByBrands />
        <NewsHighlight />
      </section>
    </main>
  );
}
